item.title: SEC and CFTC issue joint crypto asset interpretation, clarifying securities and commodities jurisdiction under Project Crypto
EU MiCA grandfathering expires July 1, requiring full CASP authorization for all 30 EEA crypto service providers or exit
OCC proposes GENIUS Act implementation rules covering national banks, federal stablecoin issuers, and revised capital standards
Treasury and FinCEN propose joint AML and sanctions compliance rules for GENIUS Act payment stablecoin issuers
North Korea-linked groups stole $577M in H1 2026 via two attacks, accounting for 76% of all crypto hack losses
KelpDAO bridge loses $292M after attackers compromise internal RPC nodes and force bridge verifier to poisoned infrastructure
Drift Protocol loses $285M after social engineering leads security council members to pre-sign malicious Solana transactions
Crypto hacks reach record 207 incidents in H1 2026; total losses amount to $972M across all incident types
Ethereum Institutional launches July 1 as nonprofit to guide banks on tokenization, stablecoins, and onchain financial infrastructure
US spot Bitcoin ETFs attract $221.7M in a single session, ending a 10-day consecutive outflow streak
Fidelity, State Street, and Invesco each launch GENIUS Act stablecoin reserve funds in June 2026
Aptos blockchain vulnerability patched after ethical hackers demonstrate $70B systemic exposure risk using a $3,000 server
GENIUS Act and MiCA impose conflicting reserve requirements, fragmenting global stablecoin compliance frameworks for issuers
BlackRock BUIDL reaches $2.5B AUM as 35 institutions including JPMorgan and Fidelity launch Ethereum-based financial products
